findings.detail: Five-node LR pipeline correctly represents the three AI eras with two bridging milestone nodes. All labels are plain-language, ≤4 words in the bold heading, with 12px subtitle spans for date ranges and bottleneck detail. Edge labels are single-line plain text. No concept drift — no LLMs, Transformers, or topics 3.2+ content present. Color tiers: start (blue) for era 1, hitl (yellow) for the two historical turning-point nodes, auto (purple) for era 2 (mid-stage), done (green) for era 3. Single strict path, no branching.

mmdc is not available in this environment. PNG could not be rendered automatically. Visual checks (overlaps, truncation, edge label collision) could not be performed on actual pixels. Run: mmdc -i <topic-dir>/artifacts/diagram.mmd -o <topic-dir>/artifacts/diagram.png -w 1400 -b transparent to produce the PNG before HITL #3 review. Source-level pre-flight passed on all checks.
